listing.title: Health Check
listing.subtitle: Review your Loadout for any issues and learn how to resolve them if needed.

item.title: Additional mod file may be required for: {{modName}}
item.requires_pick: Requires {{ count }} mod to be picked:
item.requires_pick_plural: Requires {{ count }} mods to be picked:

premium_banner.description: Download requirements in 1-click. No page visits or waiting. <premiumLink>Go premium</premiumLink>

subtitle.suggestion: Changes that could improve your loadout.
subtitle.warning: Issues that may stop parts of your loadout from working.
subtitle.error: Issues will prevent your game from working. Fix before playing.

item.title: Additional mod may be required for: {{modName}}
item.after_installing: After installing, click Confirm install. We can’t automatically detect external mod installations.
item.requires_files: Requires {{ count }} mod file to be installed to work correctly.
item.requires_files_plural: Requires {{ count }} mod files to be installed to work correctly.
item.wrong_version_installed: A different version of an installed file is required. Only one version can be enabled at a time.
item.wrong_version_enabled: The correct version is installed but a different version is enabled. Only one version can be enabled at a time.
item.correct_version_downloaded: The required version is downloaded but not installed.

feedback_modal.title: Thanks for letting us know
feedback_modal.description: Help us improve this message by telling us what went wrong.

settings.title: Health Check (Beta)
settings.description: Detect issues with your mod list and suggest fixes. More checks are coming soon.

title.single: Skip the website and install instantly.
title.all: Skip the website and install all requirements instantly.

description.single:

Free users download through the website mod pages where ads help keep the platform running.

benefits.downloads: 1-click in app downloads and mod updates
